tasks.subject: Enhance IdeaCard with editable title and body
tasks.description: Make IdeaCard more advanced with editable header (title) and body (note). Add save functionality for inline editing.

tasks.subject: Add future task scheduling and day view
tasks.description: Add ability to schedule tasks for future dates and show other days' tasks. Add scheduledDate field to tasks and day selector UI.

tasks.subject: Create Setup Wizard for first launch
tasks.description: Wizard that shows on first app start: welcome, set wake/wind-down times, create initial recurring tasks, set energy capacity, quick feature tour. Store completion in state so it only shows once.

tasks.subject: Create Daily Morning Check-in flow
tasks.description: Daily overview that shows on first load each day: set today's energy, review yesterday's wins/tasks, see today's plan, quick capture. Should be dismissable and re-accessible from tools. Store last check-in date to know when to show it.

tasks.subject: Wire wizard and check-in into App.jsx state
tasks.description: Add setupDone and lastCheckinDate to defaultState. Add showSetup and showCheckin state flags. Wire SetupWizard completion to set setupDone=true. Wire daily check-in to show when lastCheckinDate !== todayKey(). Add buttons in tools view to re-access both.

tasks.subject: Install AG-UI Python SDK in varv-server
tasks.description: No pip package exists for AG-UI Python. Will implement protocol directly as typed SSE events (it's just JSON events over SSE).

tasks.subject: Create AG-UI SSE streaming endpoint in varv-server
tasks.description: Add POST /ag-ui endpoint that emits AG-UI lifecycle/text/tool/state events via SSE. Wrap existing agent dispatch (classify, refine, breakdown, observer, sync) with AG-UI event emission.

tasks.subject: Build AG-UI React client with streaming agent display
tasks.description: Add AG-UI SSE client to frontend. Show real-time agent processing steps, streaming text, tool calls, and state updates in the UI. Replace polling-based agent log.

tasks.subject: Define Varv A2UI component catalog
tasks.description: Create A2UI component catalog for Varv's design system: TaskCard, EnergyPicker, BreathingWidget, ToolSuggestion, MorningCheckin, etc. Define which components agents can use.

tasks.subject: Build A2UI React renderer for Varv
tasks.description: Create React renderer that takes A2UI JSON messages and renders native Varv-styled components. Wire into agent streaming pipeline.

tasks.subject: Wire agents to emit A2UI messages through AG-UI stream
tasks.description: Update classify, refine, breakdown, observer agents to generate A2UI component messages alongside their AG-UI text/state events. Observatören suggests tools as A2UI cards.

tasks.subject: Create useAgentStream hook for streaming agent calls
tasks.description: Create a reusable React hook that wraps AG-UI SSE streaming for the main app flows (classify, refine, breakdown). Shows real-time progress. Replaces direct apiPost calls for agent operations.

tasks.subject: Add AgentProgress component for streaming status
tasks.description: Create a visible progress indicator that shows agent streaming status (step name, text, loading dots) during capture/refine/breakdown flows. Replaces the simple "robotar..." toast.

tasks.subject: Wire autoCapture, refineIdea, breakdownTask to streaming
tasks.description: Replace apiPost('/api/agents/classify'), apiPost('/api/agents/refine'), aiBreakdown() with AG-UI streaming calls. Keep placeClassified logic. Each flow: start stream → show progress → on RUN_FINISHED extract result → persist.
